title: Thermo Vanquish + Orbitrap Exploris: intact-protein LC-MS (kit)
description: Paired reversed-phase gradient and Orbitrap Exploris MS setup for denaturing intact-protein / intact-mass LC-MS (Thermo app note 73885). Instantiates both leaf methods together.

payload.description: A combination kit that bundles the matching LC gradient and MS setup for denaturing intact-protein / intact-mass LC-MS on a Thermo Vanquish feeding an Orbitrap Exploris (BioPharma). Sample flows LC then MS: component 0 is the reversed-phase intact-protein gradient, component 1 is the Full MS intact-protein acquisition setup. Each component keeps its own source provenance. Representative starting-point methods, verify against the source and tune per instrument and sample.
